_comment: COMPLIANCE (Section 0.6): every number below MUST be verified with current local sources before any public launch. Override the whole object via CRISIS_RESOURCES_JSON env var. verified:false items show a review warning in server logs.
advice_ar: كلم حد قريب منك دلوقتي — صاحب تثق فيه، حد من أهلك، أو مختص. متفضلش لوحدك.
advice_en: Talk to someone close to you right now — a trusted friend, a family member, or a professional. Please don't stay alone with this.
emergency_ar: لو في خطر على حياتك دلوقتي، اتصل بالطوارئ فورًا.
emergency_en: If your life is in immediate danger, call emergency services now.
